[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110011011 6
1 0001101111 6
2 0011000100 3
3 0101111101 7
4 1010011111 7
5 0110100011 5
6 1101101101 7
7 1010110010 5
